heading: Statement of reasons for denial of claim
label: 944 Statement of reasons for denial of claim
text: Any individual whose claim for benefits under this subchapter is denied shall receive from the Secretary a written statement of the reasons for denial of such claim, and a summary of the administrative hearing record or, upon good cause shown, a copy of any transcript thereof.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1978 Amendment note under .Mar. 1, 1978section 20(a) of Pub. L. 95–239section 901 of this title
